transitions.name: flip_r1_to_negative
transitions.description: Flip R1 from +1 to −1 while leaving all other registers untouched.

transitions.name: ignite_r2_from_r1
transitions.description: If R1 is +1 and R2 is zero, seed R2 as +1 while keeping R1 positive.

transitions.name: settle_parity
transitions.description: Mark parity register R4 as +1 when the first two registers are +1.

transitions.name: reset_r2
transitions.description: Bring R2 back to zero when it is negative.
